name: Crexendo, Inc.
business: Crexendo, Inc. is a provider of cloud communication platform software and unified communications as a service (UCaaS) offering, including voice, video, contact center, and managed IT services, tailored to businesses of all sizes. It supports over seven million end users globally through a network of over 240 cloud communication platform software subscribers and direct retail. The company operates through two segments: Cloud Telecommunications Services and Software Solutions.

exposures.sentence: Crexendo, Inc. is an award-winning software technology company that is a premier provider of cloud communication platform software and unified communications as a service (UCaaS) offering, including voice, video, contact center, and managed IT services tailored to businesses of all sizes.
Cyber-attacks impacting our networks or systems could have an adverse effect on our business.
We are in the process of migrating from our own physical data centers to the Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI).
Our increasing use of artificial intelligence and automation in customer facing products and internal operations exposes us to new regulatory, reputational, contractual, and product liability risks.
The pace at which generative AI capabilities evolve, improve, and commoditize may materially alter customer expectations, competitive dynamics, and product requirements.
